CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS float_test (f_float Float32, f_double Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO float_test VALUES (1.5, 2.5), (3.25, 4.75), (5.125, 6.875);
SELECT f_float, f_double, f_float + f_double as sum FROM float_test;
SELECT sum(f_float) AS total_float, sum(f_double) AS total_double FROM float_test;
SELECT round(f_float, 2) AS rounded_float FROM float_test;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS float_decimal_test (my_float Float64, my_decimal Decimal64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO float_decimal_test SELECT round(rand() % 100 + rand() / 100, 3) AS my_float, round(rand() % 100 + rand() / 100, 3) FROM system.numbers LIMIT 100000;
SELECT sum(my_float) AS total_float, sum(my_decimal) AS total_decimal FROM float_decimal_test;
SELECT sumKahan(my_float), sumKahan(my_decimal) FROM float_decimal_test;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS float_operations_test (a Float64, b Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO float_operations_test VALUES (0.1, 0.2), (1.5, 2.8), (3.6, 4.4);
SELECT (a + b) AS addition, (a - b) AS subtraction, (a * b) AS multiplication, (a / b) AS division FROM float_operations_test;
SELECT 1 - 0.9 AS difference;
SELECT 0.5 / 0 AS infinity_check;
SELECT -0.5 / 0 AS negative_infinity_check;
SELECT 0 / 0 AS nan_check;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS join_test (id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO join_test VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, 20.25), (3, 30.75);
SELECT j.id, j.value, (j.value + it.value) AS total_value FROM join_test AS j JOIN float_test AS it ON j.id = it.id;
SELECT f.value, (SELECT sum(f2.value) FROM join_test AS f2 WHERE f2.id = f.id) AS inner_sum FROM join_test AS f;
SELECT AVG(f_float) FROM float_test WHERE f_float < 3.0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM float_test WHERE f_float IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT f_float FROM float_test WHERE f_float > 0.0;
